race.comment: BEE ADMIRED (10) is a filly by Admire Mars on debut for the Charlotte Littlefield yard. She looks to have good ability having won her latest trial here over 1000m and the raced brigade haven't shown ability that she can't match here. MIDNIGHT MAN (5) is the one that sets a decent benchmark. He's run distant thirds at his past two, solid to the line at Cranbourne over 1200m last time. He'll land up on speed and run another strong race. NEW PROSPECT (8) is a gelding by Cool Aza Beel on debut for the Griffiths yard. He's been jumping out well and should be ready to go. HANDSOME MISSILE (7) resumes having not fired in two runs last time in. He's run a trial leading in this time around and could improve. TRANSPORTER (9) is a gelding by Calyx on debut for the Busuttin & Young stable who can run well.
